name: always_valid_address
reason: If provable, the spec is vacuously true and valid_physical_address never rejects any input.

name: boundary_len_exact_valid
reason: If provable, the boundary is off-by-one and addresses of length exactly 0x100000 are accepted.

name: empty_id_invalid
reason: If provable, zero-length addresses are rejected, which would be undesirable since empty IDs should be valid physical addresses.

name: new_hashmap_nonempty
reason: If provable, the empty map postcondition of HashMap::new is inconsistent and the map already contains keys.

name: zero_count_nonempty_set
reason: If provable, requesting zero un-acked messages still yields packets, meaning the count parameter has no filtering effect.
